name: Studio Golfer
address: 1476 W Herndon Ave Ste 102, Fresno, CA 93711
about: Studio Golfer is a premium indoor driving range and golf studio located in Fresno, CA. The facility operates on a membership-only basis and is powered by TrackMan technology, offering various game modes for all skill levels from competitive challenges to leisurely rounds. Access to the studio requires an active membership, the Studio Golfer app, and a confirmed booking. The venue provides a focused environment for practice, with amenities like custom fittings, lessons, and a pro shop, all accessible through their proprietary app.
why_golfers_like_it: High-precision TrackMan dual radar technology for detailed swing and ball data
App-based booking and access for seamless, contact-less experience
Variety of session lengths (30, 60, 120 minutes) and bay configurations
On-site Players Pantry for purchasing golf balls, food, and drinks
Dedicated space for custom club fittings and professional lessons

food_and_drink.notes: Available for purchase in the Players Pantry via the app
Not mentioned as available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Features dual radar technology for maximum data quality and increased pickup rates

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs. Club rentals are not available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. Food, beverage items, gloves, and golf balls can be purchased in the Players Pantry via the app.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes can be played in 30-45 minutes for 1 player, or 1 hour for 2 players per bay.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether the facility is kid-friendly or offers junior programs.
